analysis.summary: Flight search 'max price' filter returns the most expensive flights
analysis.description:
Searching flights with a maximum price returns only flights that cost MORE than the limit, instead of flights at or under it.
Steps to reproduce:
Call GET /flights/search?max_price=200
Observe that only flights priced above 200 are returned
Expected behaviour:
The results include only flights whose price is less than or equal to the given max_price.
Affected file:
backend/app/services/flight_service.py (search_flights)
